label: Theorem proving & symbolic deduction

node.label: Theorem proving & symbolic deduction
node.definition: Theorem provers derive conclusions from axioms and inference rules, producing proofs or proof obligations that a trusted kernel can check.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Theorem proving & symbolic deduction is modeled as depending on Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving, Neuro-symbolic models and feeding downstream nodes such as Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI.

limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving, Neuro-symbolic models.
